game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Isle of Arrows – Tower Defense** Isle of Arrows is a roguelike puzzle tower defense game where players build a fortress on a floating island using randomly generated tiles. Each round, players receive a free tile (e.g., towers, roads, flags, gardens) to place on the grid via tap controls, with the option to spend coins to skip to the next tile. Towers attack invaders, roads extend the enemy path, flags expand the island's buildable area, and gardens generate coins, with over 50 unique tile types offering varied strategic interactions (e.g., taverns boosting adjacent archery towers). Once defenses are set, players tap a "Call Wave" button to unleash enemies, and the run ends if too many invaders escape the island. Progression involves completing campaign stages to unlock new tiles, enemies, and bonus cards (75+ available) for subsequent runs, increasing strategic depth and difficulty.
game_info.description: Isle of Arrows is a roguelike tower defense puzzle game where you build your fortress on a floating island using randomly generated tiles. Place towers to destroy invaders, roads to extend enemy paths, flags to expand buildable area, and gardens to generate coins. Each wave, you receive a free random tile to place strategically on the grid. When ready, call the wave to unleash enemies. Survive all waves without letting too many enemies escape to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move tile placement cursor
Space: Place current tile on the grid
Shift: Skip current tile (costs coins)
Z: Call wave (start enemy attack)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Validates that the game can place tiles, earn coins, and interact with basic game mechanics without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly place tiles on available spaces, occasionally skip tiles when coins are available, and call waves when enough defenses are built.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game runs without errors, tiles are placed successfully, coins are earned from gardens, and waves can be called. Test is successful if game progresses through multiple waves.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Validates that optimal strategic play can lead to winning the game by surviving all waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize placing towers near starting positions, extend paths with roads to maximize tower exposure time, place gardens early for coin generation, and use flags to expand territory. Call waves only when sufficient defense is established.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully survive all enemy waves with strategic tower placement and path extension. Test passes when GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached.
